name: UltraBass Wireless Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with hybrid ANC, 40-hour battery life, and soft memory-foam earcups for long listening sessions.

name: PulseFit Smart Watch S2
description: Track workouts, sleep, and heart rate with GPS and a bright AMOLED display. Water resistant up to 50 meters.

name: Retro Canvas Sneakers
description: Breathable canvas upper with cushioned sole and minimalist profile for everyday comfort and style.

name: Storm Mini Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable speaker with punchy bass, IPX7 waterproofing, and 14-hour playtime for travel or outdoor use.

name: Nordic Ceramic Mug Set (4)
description: Hand-finished ceramic mugs with matte glaze, 12oz capacity, microwave safe, and dishwasher safe.

name: FlexArm LED Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable desk lamp with 5 color temperatures, 10 brightness levels, and touch controls.

name: Commuter Backpack 30L
description: Water-resistant backpack with padded 16-inch laptop sleeve, quick-access pockets, and breathable back panel.

name: RGB Mechanical Keyboard K87
description: Hot-swappable 87-key keyboard with tactile switches, tri-mode connectivity, and per-key RGB effects.

name: Ergo Wireless Mouse Pro
description: Ergonomic vertical mouse with silent clicks, 3 DPI modes, and rechargeable battery.

name: 4K USB-C Monitor 27"
description: 27-inch IPS monitor with 4K resolution, USB-C power delivery, and factory-calibrated color accuracy.

name: Minimal Leather Wallet
description: Slim RFID-blocking wallet crafted from full-grain leather with quick card access slot.

name: Performance Running Shoes
description: Lightweight running shoes with energy-return foam and breathable knit upper for daily training.

name: Smart Air Purifier
description: HEPA air purifier with app control, auto mode, and quiet night operation for rooms up to 40m².

name: Chef Knife Set (3)
description: High-carbon stainless steel knife trio with ergonomic handles and precision-honed edges.

name: Yoga Mat Pro 6mm
description: Non-slip, high-density yoga mat with alignment markers and carrying strap.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Pair
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells from 5lb to 52.5lb with quick-change selector dial.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast USB 3.2 SSD with durable aluminum shell and cross-platform compatibility.

name: Noise-Isolating Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with ENC mics, compact charging case, and 28-hour total battery.

name: Standing Desk Converter
description: Gas-spring height-adjustable desk converter with keyboard tray and stable steel frame.

name: Linen Bedding Set Queen
description: Breathable stone-washed linen bedding set for year-round comfort and relaxed texture.

name: Polarized Sunglasses
description: UV400 polarized lenses with lightweight frame and anti-scratch coating.

name: Stainless Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall insulated bottle keeps drinks cold for 24h or hot for 12h.

name: Travel Neck Pillow Memory Foam
description: Ergonomic neck pillow with breathable cover and compact travel pouch.

name: Action Camera 4K
description: Waterproof 4K action camera with stabilization, wide-angle lens, and accessory kit.
